commentaries.author: Cornelius a Lapide
commentaries.content:
And all the people came early in the morning to Him. The senses are in their vigour in the morning, and the morning therefore, as the best part of the day, is to be given to God.
>

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content: Fit hours for an audience there also were. "Early in the morning"
